ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the program was uploaded */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the program */,
  "source_code_url" TEXT /* URL to the source code of the program */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the program is distributed */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags for categorization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the program */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the program */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the programming language */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or specification version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the language entry */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the language entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the language entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program engine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the engine */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or specification version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the engine entry */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the engine entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the engine entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engines_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the program variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the variant */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or specification version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the variant entry */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the variant entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizers" (
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimizer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the optimizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimizer */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the optimizer */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or specification version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the optimizer entry */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the optimizer entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the optimizer entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimizers_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimizers_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runtimes" (
  "runtime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each runtime environment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the runtime environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the runtime environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the runtime environment */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard or specification version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the runtime entry */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the runtime entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the runtime entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("runtime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtimes_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runtimes_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_languages" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language used in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_engines" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine used in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_variants" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant used in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_optimizers" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimizer used in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_runtimes" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "runtime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the runtime environment used in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id", "runtime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run benchmark) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the program */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_last_modified_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
